vocab.meaning: thả hồn theo những suy nghĩ, trầm ngâm
vocab.example: I often look out the window and get lost in thought while the car cruises down the highway.

vocab.meaning: một cảnh tượng đáng chiêm ngưỡng (cực kỳ đẹp)
vocab.example: The coastal cliffs we passed yesterday were truly a sight to behold from the bus window.

vocab.meaning: ở nơi hẻo lánh, ít người biết đến
vocab.example: I prefer traveling through routes that are off the beaten track to see more authentic scenery.

vocab.meaning: đẹp đến mức nghẹt thở, làm ai đó sửng sốt
vocab.example: The panoramic view of the valley was so majestic that it literally took my breath away.

vocab.meaning: say sưa ngắm nhìn cái gì đó đẹp đẽ
vocab.example: I love to sit by the window and feast my eyes on the vibrant colors of the autumn leaves.

vocab.meaning: vẹn cả đôi đường (hưởng lợi từ hai tình huống khác nhau)
vocab.example: Sitting in a luxury car while watching a rugged landscape gives me the best of both worlds: comfort and nature.
When the scenery is captivating, a six-hour journey seems to go by in a flash.

vocab.meaning: rất gần, chỉ cách một quãng ngắn
vocab.example: I enjoy seeing the local life when the bus passes by houses that are just a stone's throw from the road.

vocab.meaning: hồi phục năng lượng, nghỉ ngơi
vocab.example: Gazing at the rolling green hills is a great way for me to recharge my batteries during a hectic trip.

vocab.meaning: để tâm trí trôi dạt tự do
vocab.example: There's nothing better than looking at the horizon and letting your mind wander without any distractions.
